fontFamilies: "Mona Sans VF", -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, "Segoe UI", "Noto Sans", Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif, "Apple Color Emoji", "Segoe UI Emoji"
"Inter Variable", "SF Pro Display", -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, "Segoe UI", Roboto, Oxygen, Ubuntu, Cantarell, "Open Sans", "Helvetica Neue", sans-serif

boxShadows: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) 0px 0px 0px 0px, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) 0px 0px 0px 0px, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) 0px 0px 0px 0px, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) 0px 0px 0px 0px, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.145) 0px 0px 0px 1px, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.02) 0px 1px 1px 0px, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.04) 0px 4px 8px 0px, rgb(0, 0, 0) 0px 0px 0px 1px, rgb(10, 10, 10) 0px 0px 0px 1px
